---
title: "Martin Luquet tentative website"
format: html
---

## Welcome!

- I am a postdoc researcher working at the interface between behavioural and population ecology, mainly using quantitative methods. Currently, I work at the [Laboratory for Alpine Ecology](https://leca.osug.fr/), where I study some behavioural aspects of predator-prey interactions.

- This is my attempt to create my website using Quarto. I created this thanks to Cecilia Baldoni in a SORTEE workshop https://cecibaldoni.github.io/. Thank you Cecilia! It's quite messy for now though haha.

- I aim at using this as a place of expression. Not just as a resume or something. I don't want to oversell myself or anything of that kind. I'm not really into the career stuff anyway, but I'd like to use this to express my doubts about the whole scientific research entreprise, my insecurities, also provide a list of my publications but pinpoint their limits. There may be a blog too!
